question_text: Which statement best describes an unbalanced force?

options.label: A
options.text: Two forces of different sizes acting in opposite directions

options.label: B
options.text: A resultant force that causes an object to accelerate or change direction

options.label: C
options.text: Any force that acts alone on an object

options.label: D
options.text: Forces that are not in contact with the object

explanation: An unbalanced force means the resultant (net) force is not zero, so the object will accelerate, decelerate, or change direction. This is the key difference from balanced forces, which produce no change in motion.
